projects.title: Cortex AI + MCP Analytics App
projects.description: Natural language analytics powered by Snowflake Cortex AI and the Model Context Protocol. Ask questions in plain English and get SQL-backed answers directly from your Snowflake warehouse — no query writing required.

projects.title: ELT Pipeline: dbt + Snowflake + Airflow
projects.description: Production-grade ELT pipeline with Apache Airflow orchestration, dbt Medallion architecture transformations, and Snowflake warehousing. Features incremental models, SCD Type 2 snapshots, and automated daily scheduling via Docker-based Airflow.

projects.title: Snowflake Data Profiler
projects.description: Native Streamlit app for interactive data profiling within Snowflake. Schema inspection, column statistics, null analysis, and data quality checks — all running inside Snowflake so data never leaves the warehouse.

projects.title: End-to-End Analytics Pipeline
projects.description: Complete modern data stack from raw ingestion to Tableau BI dashboards. Demonstrates best practices across Snowflake for cloud warehousing, dbt for modular SQL transformations, and Tableau for business intelligence reporting.

projects.title: Real-Time Warehousing with Snowflake
projects.description: Real-time data warehousing using Snowflake Streams & Tasks for incremental change propagation, Snowpipe for automated event-driven ingestion from S3/Azure Blob, and dynamic warehouse sizing for cost governance.

projects.title: dbt Jaffle Shop Sandbox
projects.description: Open-source dbt learning environment built on a fictional sandwich shop dataset. Covers dbt fundamentals: models, tests, documentation, seeds, and snapshots. A hands-on reference for dbt best practices and workflow patterns.
